title: An Integrative Methylation-Metabolism Gene Signature Defines Prognosis and Immunosuppressive Microenvironment in Prostate Cancer.
snippet: The synergistic crosstalk between epigenetic dysregulation and metabolic reprogramming underlies to prostate cancer (PCa) development and treatment resistance, yet an integrated prognostic signature reflecting this nexus remains poorly defined. We developed and validated a gene signature associated with methylation and amino acid metabolism for patient stra...

title: Lipids and abdominal aortic aneurysm: from pathophysiology to therapy. A call to action from the Italian Society for the Study of Atherosclerosis and the Italian Society for Angiology and Vascular Medicine.
publicationName: Nutrition, metabolism, and cardiovascular diseases : NMCD
journalName: Nutrition, metabolism, and cardiovascular diseases : NMCD
snippet: To critically evaluate current evidence on the role of lipoproteins and lipid-regulating proteins in the pathophysiology of abdominal aortic aneurysm (AAA), and to explore their diagnostic, prognostic, and therapeutic implications.
